hero_title_accent: For VASP Operations and Case Management
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows that automate case management, preserve audit evidence, and unify internal and regulatory reporting for digital asset compliance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance reporting slows across disconnected workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams managing digital asset reporting face delays when data and case evidence remain spread over multiple systems. This fragmentation makes it harder to produce consistent, audit-ready reports and to maintain clear links between regulatory changes and operational responses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, case workflows, decision logs and regulatory updates into one unified process so compliance teams can produce consistent, audit-ready reports with clear evidence trails.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance reports
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs through rules, case workflow, decision logging and evidence preservation to deliver standardized internal and external compliance reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects compliance checks into standardized workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence to streamline reporting and maintain consistency across digital asset compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled compliance platform to connect provider outputs, preserve audit-grade evidence and support bank due diligence within enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve evidence and decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready reports support internal and external reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected operating layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and case workflows into structured compliance decisions and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY standardize reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates risk-based routing, approval queues and case creation to consistently generate standardized internal and external compliance reports from provider outputs and case data.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and evidence packages in an audit-ready format supporting internal review, regulatory inspection and bank due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning fragmented outputs into connected workflows without replacing underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above Travel Rule and KYT providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing any core compliance providers.
final_title: Structure reporting workflows into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, case records and decision logs into standardized compliance reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
